specific_mechanism: Compose K incommensurable celestial cycles via differential gear into one shared time index.
llm_application: ANTIKY-LLM: attention heads K each tied to distinct PRIME period rotors; differential-gear fusion combines per-head position vectors into a composite position encoding (Chinese-Remainder-style); output is angle of differential gear-sum.
novelty_claim: Open whether covered by RoPE multi-frequency variants — RoPE uses 1/10000-base geometric frequency series, not prime-period CRT composition. Could be PASS-with-caveat region.
